q1_process: AI-assisted patient triage for urgent care clinics
q3_volume: 3 years of EHR data, 500k+ labeled patient encounters
q3_compliance: HIPAA, GDPR (if EU patients), FDA (if medical device)
q4_direct_cost: $200 per mis-triage (medical error cost), $10M+ regulatory fine for HIPAA breach
q4_regulatory: HIPAA mandatory, FDA pre-market notification likely
q4_distribution: 80% of mis-triages are level 3 being sent home instead of held
q5_frustrations: slow during peak hours, inconsistent between nurses, high burnout
q6_primary_metric: Reduce critical mis-triages by 50%, reduce triage time by 40%
q6_threshold: >95% precision for level 1/2, <18 seconds average triage time
q6_measurement: EHR audit logs, patient satisfaction surveys, weekly clinical quality reviews
